overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city street at night. The scene features distinctive golden hexagonal building facades, digital billboards, passing police vehicles, and transitions from open sidewalks to covered walkways and intersections.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban sidewalk with digital advertising and parking structure

events.description: pedestrian with green hair and teal pants turns left and exits the frame

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian with distinctive green hair and teal pants along the neon-lit sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with green hair and teal pants walking ahead of the camera

entered.detail: concrete parking structure with multiple open levels and internal lighting
large vertical billboard displaying OCT 30 event advertisement in purple and gold
building facade with illuminated golden hexagonal pattern creating geometric light effect
concrete benches with orange neon underlighting where pedestrians are seated

segments.scene_description: The camera follows a pedestrian with green hair through a covered urban sidewalk. To the right, a multi-storey parking garage and digital billboards are visible, while the left side features a distinctive golden hexagonal building facade. Other pedestrians sit on neon-lit benches along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with illuminated hexagonal building facade and vehicle traffic

events.description: NCPD police car with glowing blue lights drives past on the left side of the street
multiple civilian vehicles drive past on the multi-lane street to the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to the golden hexagonal building, observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: NCPD police car with illuminated blue underglow driving past on the street

entered.detail: futuristic police vehicle with glowing blue accents and NCPD markings

segments.scene_description: After the pedestrian exits the frame, the camera continues along the sidewalk beside the massive golden hexagonal building. An NCPD police car and other vehicles pass by on the left, while the street benches recede into the distance on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under elevated highway structure with structural pillars

events.description: entering darker covered walkway with structural pillars on the left side
passing other pedestrians walking in the opposite direction in the covered section

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrower covered section with large structural pillars lining the left side

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking away from camera in the distance under the covered walkway

entered.detail: massive structural support columns of the elevated highway overhead creating a corridor effect
modern building with illuminated windows and horizontal neon trim lighting

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a darker, enclosed walkway beneath an elevated highway structure. Large concrete pillars line the left side while a modern glass office building with neon trim appears on the right. The golden hexagonal building becomes distant on the left as the camera moves deeper under the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with crosswalk, traffic signals, and waiting vehicles

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open intersection area with visible crosswalk
approaching crosswalk with traffic lights and vehicles waiting at the intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering a crosswalk at a busy intersection with moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic

notable_agents.action: red sedan waiting at the traffic light near the crosswalk

entered.detail: zebra crossing with yellow stripes marking the pedestrian crossing area
tall pole with digital traffic signals showing 09 and street signs
massive concrete overpass structure visible overhead at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered walkway into a wide-open intersection. A crosswalk with yellow stripes spans the multi-lane street, while traffic lights and various vehicles occupy the road. The elevated highway structure looms overhead, and tall office towers with illuminated windows fill the background as the camera approaches the crossing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban corridor that transitions from a covered sidewalk into a wide, open city intersection. It begins by following a green-haired pedestrian past neon-lit benches and a distinctive golden hexagonal building facade. As the pedestrian exits the frame, the camera continues along the sidewalk, passing an NCPD police car and other vehicles flowing by on the left. The scene then shifts into a darker, enclosed walkway beneath an elevated highway, where massive concrete pillars and a glass office building replace the open street. Finally, the camera emerges from the shadows of the overpass into a bright intersection, moving toward a yellow-striped crosswalk surrounded by towering office buildings and city traffic.
